overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction RPG showing a character exploring an industrial-style outfitter shop with holographic displays and metal shelving. The character walks through the interior space examining workbenches and storage areas in a futuristic commercial setting.

entered.detail: large glowing blue planet hologram suspended above the main counter
illuminated orange sign with the shop name below the hologram

main service desk with computer terminals and equipment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic outfitter shop with a prominent holographic globe display hovering above the central counter. The character stands near the entrance observing the industrial interior with metal shelving and illuminated signage, then turns right to walk along the wall. A shopkeeper NPC stands behind the counter in the background as the character begins to explore the right side of the store.

scene_state.functional_zone: workbench and equipment area along the right wall

events.description: holographic globe display moves out of view behind the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right wall past workbenches and industrial equipment

entered.detail: cluttered workbench with various tools and crafting equipment
metal shelving unit with boxes and supplies along the right wall
yellow rolling utility cart with tools and parts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right wall of the shop past industrial workbenches cluttered with tools and equipment. Metal shelving units line the wall holding various supplies, and a yellow utility cart sits near the work area. The holographic display and main counter are now behind the character as they move deeper into the store.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage corner with shelves and dark doorway

events.description: lighting becomes slightly dimmer approaching the back corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the back corner with storage shelves and examining the dark doorway ahead

entered.detail: tall shelving unit with stacked white containers and supplies
dark corridor entrance leading to back rooms or storage area
large potted plant with broad leaves next to the shelving

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the back corner of the shop where tall storage shelves hold stacked containers and supplies. A large potted plant sits beside the shelving, and a dark doorway leads to a dimly lit corridor beyond. The lighting shifts to a slightly darker tone as the character approaches the rear wall of the industrial space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic outfitter shop that transitions from a bright, holographic central hub to a dim industrial storage area. It begins near the entrance, where a holographic globe hovers above a central counter and a shopkeeper stands in the background, before the camera turns right to follow the character along the wall. As the character moves deeper into the store, the main counter recedes and the view shifts toward a series of industrial workbenches cluttered with tools and metal shelving units. The scene then expands into the back corner of the shop, passing a yellow utility cart and a large potted plant. Finally, the lighting shifts to a darker tone as the camera approaches tall storage shelves and a dimly lit corridor leading away from the main commercial space.
